prompt_task: Consider the MicroC data for H1 and HFF cells from the following paper: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.molcel.2020.03.003. In the sub-compartment containing the NANOG gene (chr12:7629950-7809597), there is a differential loop between the two samples. Report the position of the loop (on chr12) in the following format start;end, with start<end rounded to the nearest 20000 and no commas. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
